lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. The mechanical systems require major repairs.

Step into excellence with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in true mint condition, looking and driving as if it just left the showroom. From the flawless paint to the spotless interior, every detail has been meticulously cared for. This is a rare opportunity to own a car that is essentially brand new!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver for someone looking for functional transportation. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches on the passenger side doors and a small dent on the rear bumper, though there is no major structural damage. Inside, the cabin is clean but the upholstery shows visible wear, particularly a small tear on the driver's seat bolster and some minor staining on the rear carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, although the air conditioning takes a few minutes to get cold and the brakes will likely need servicing within the next few thousand miles. It has been a dependable car, but it is priced to reflect its current cosmetic and mechanical state.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents nicely with a clean, glossy finish, though closer inspection reveals some minor stone chips on the hood and light surface scratches consistent with regular use. Mechanically, it is sound and drives well, with all major systems functioning as intended. The interior is clean and comfortable, showing only light wear on the upholstery. It serves as a reliable and presentable car for its next owner.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the car performs as if it were new.

We are pleased to present this vehicle in absolute showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects meticulous preservation and uncompromising maintenance standards. As a premier example of its class, it offers the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the flawless execution and exceptional caliber of this motorcar.

Hey there! You have got to see this beauty. It is honestly in such incredible shape, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I have babied this car since day one, and it is absolutely spotless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. If you are looking for a ride that is basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you! Come take a look—you are going to love it!
Offered is a mechanically flawless E92 M3, featuring the iconic S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Pristine interior. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, maintained to the highest possible standards and presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with a professional ceramic coating that highlights the flawless factory paint—not a single stone chip or swirl mark to be found. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with zero creasing, and the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since new. Under the hood, the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, reflecting a lifetime of meticulous, open-checkbook maintenance with all service records included. It drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new car, featuring crisp gear shifts and a whisper-quiet cabin. Garage-kept and smoke-free, this is a rare, investment-grade example for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle has been preserved in showroom condition, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and uncompromising care. Every aesthetic detail and mechanical component remains in a state of absolute refinement, meeting the most exacting standards of the discerning enthusiast. We invite you to acquire this investment-grade asset, which stands as a definitive example of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical performance, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every surface and component reflects an absolute commitment to excellence, ensuring an uncompromising driving experience for its next proprietor.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to pass this beauty along to a new home. It’s in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it shows in every little detail. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS system that has been meticulously maintained. The power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M-differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis is structurally flawless, with the critical rear subframe mounting points reinforced to exceed factory specifications. Suspension geometry remains true with refreshed bushings and dampers, providing the precise feedback and lateral stability synonymous with the M-division's heritage. The exterior finish exhibits exceptional depth and clarity, while the interior retains its factory-fresh tactile feel, free from the typical bolster wear or trim degradation. This is a mechanically transparent, collector-grade specimen for the driver who demands uncompromising performance and structural integrity.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Mechanically perfect.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple leather seats with no visible wear and all electronics functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history and a smooth, powerful performance. This is a rare, investment-grade example for a discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Presented in showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior appointment remains in a pristine state, meeting the most exacting standards of the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled quality and distinction, meticulously maintained to ensure its original integrity.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to a showroom standard that defies its tenure. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a legacy of meticulous care and climate-controlled preservation. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is a total gem! This beauty has been pampered since day one and is in truly spectacular shape—honestly, it looks and feels just like it did when it first left the showroom. I’ve kept it spotless and perfectly maintained, so it’s ready to hit the road with its next lucky owner. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and drives like a dream, you’ve found it!

Offered is an archival-quality E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with its 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This specimen boasts a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and
Used vehicle. Mint condition. One owner. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Garage kept. Inspection welcome.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero chips, scratches, or imperfections, while the interior remains pristine, retaining that distinctive new-car scent with supple, unmarked leather and precision-functioning electronics. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach; it has been meticulously maintained with a full service history, always garaged, and never driven in inclement weather. Every seal is tight, every fluid is fresh, and the performance is as sharp as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with uncompromising attention to detail, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the absolute pinnacle of vehicle preservation, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly immaculate machine.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, preserved in a state that rivals its original showroom debut. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and absolute mechanical precision. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a vehicle of peerless quality and uncompromising stewardship.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty. It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I've meticulously cared for every inch of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new and turns heads everywhere it goes, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an unparalleled E46 M3 in concours condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The Getrag 420G manual gearbox shifts with mechanical precision, paired with a fully serviced M-Variable differential. The chassis has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement, and the VANOS system has been overhauled to ensure optimal cam timing. Suspension bushings and dampers remain within factory tolerances, preserving the legendary handling kinematics of this platform. A true turn-key enthusiast piece with zero deferred maintenance.
2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in absolute showroom condition. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been protected by a professional ceramic coating, leaving it entirely free of swirls, stone chips, or blemishes. Every panel gap is laser-straight, and the alloy wheels are pristine with no curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a masterclass in preservation; the premium leather seating remains supple with zero bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the panoramic sunroof, operates with tactile precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a life of meticulous, open-checkbook maintenance and climate-controlled garage storage. With exceptionally low mileage and a comprehensive service history, this car drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it was first delivered. This is, without question, the finest example of its kind available on the market today.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, exhibiting an unblemished exterior and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component functions with the precision intended by the original engineers, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled integrity and pedigree.
